subject: Starly — a small round bird Pokemon perched among leafy branches
description: A small round bird Pokemon sits perched on a branch amid lush green foliage. The bird has compact plumage with a pale rounded body, dark wings, and a white facial marking with a small dark eye. The setting is a leafy green environment suggesting a field or forest edge. The overall composition is quiet and naturalistic, with soft dappled lighting filtering through the leaves.
